---
title: "Class19_Rob"
author: "Rob Schlom"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

I'm teammate 1, so I'll be in charge of functions 1&4

Testing function 1 (upload_fasta())
```{r}
upload_fasta("testfasta.txt")
```

```{r}
upload_fasta("testfasta.txt")$A
```

Testing function 4 (splitpeptides_to_masses())

```{r}
aa <- list(A=list(c("L","V","K"),
c("L","H","H","I","I","F","E","S","M","L","K"), c("D","M","Q","R")),
B=list(c("A","D","E","F","Q","G","S","M","Q","K"),
c("I","E","A","C","W","Q","S","Y","D","V","Q","F")),
C=list(c("M","I","N","E","P","F","S","W","R"),
c("L","E","F","H","L","S","E","R"), c("Y","D","E","I","M")))
```

```{r}
splitpeptides_to_masses(aa)
```

```{r}
splitpeptides_to_masses(aa)$A
```
